summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of music theory learning app. All 5 requested features are working correctly. All regression tests passed.

minor.issue: Setup page still shows TWO scale type selectors (Source and Target), but the game enforces a single shared scale type. This is a UX inconsistency - users might expect to set different scale types but the game ignores the target scale type.
minor.note: The Game view correctly shows only ONE scale type selector as per Feature 2 requirement

passed_tests: Feature 1: Correct answer display - 'Correct: [answer]' appears below question box when user answers incorrectly
Feature 2: Transposition mode - Game view has ONE scale type selector that applies to both source and target scales
Feature 3: Question display box width - Box has min-w-[250px] md:min-w-[350px] max-w-[95vw] classes for long chord names
Feature 4: Dark theme toggle - Theme toggle button exists in game view, clicking toggles dark mode, saved in localStorage
Feature 5: Mid-game scale change - Changing enabled scale types in settings modal generates new valid question
Regression: All 5 game modes accessible from home page (Number→Chord, Chord→Number, Transposition, Interval Recognition, Interval Transposition)
Regression: Setup page scale type checkboxes work (Major, Natural Minor, Harmonic Minor, Other Modes)
Regression: Timer modes work correctly (untimed and timed with 15s/30s/60s options)
Regression: Number→Chord mode - Shows quality switch (Major/Minor/Dim/Aug) and 12 root note buttons
Regression: Chord→Number mode - Shows quality switch with 5 options including Flat, and 7 degree buttons (I-VII)
Regression: Transposition mode - Shows From/To root selectors and single scale type selector
Regression: Interval Recognition mode - Shows 12+ interval buttons, no scale settings in setup
Regression: Interval Transposition mode - Shows 12 note buttons with start note, direction, and interval
Regression: Timed mode timer counts down correctly (verified 15s → 13s after 2 seconds)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider removing the Target Scale Type selector from Setup page for Transposition mode since the game ignores it and uses the Source Scale Type for both
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (<span> cannot be child of <option>/<select>) - these are from the visual editor wrapper and don't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features from the review request are working correctly. The app uses HashRouter so URLs are like /#/setup, /#/game. Dark theme toggle is in game header. Settings modal (gear icon) allows changing scale types mid-game. Previous iteration mentioned a 'Loading...' issue with timed mode but it appears to be fixed now.
